seoTitle: Woongarra vs Woongoolba — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Woongarra and Woongoolba. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Woongarra and Woongoolba.
heading: Woongarra vs Woongoolba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Woongarra, Queensland and Woongoolba, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Woongarra has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Woongoolba (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Woongarra or Woongoolba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Woongarra has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Woongoolba scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Woongarra scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Woongoolba scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Woongarra or Woongoolba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Woongarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
